turns.query: Which Summer Olympics did the competitor who has won the most medals win four gold and two silver medals?
What is the ratio of male to female athletes in these?

tools.name: get_games_names_by_competitor_v1_olympics_games_names_by_competitor_get
tools.description: Retrieves the names of the Olympic Games in which a specified competitor has participated. The competitor is identified by their full name.
tools.default_descr: Get the names of the games in which a specific competitor participated

tools.name: get_games_names_by_competitor_age_v1_olympics_games_names_by_competitor_age_get
tools.description: Retrieve the names of the games in which a specific competitor, identified by their full name, participated at a specified age.
tools.default_descr: Get the names of the games in which a specific competitor participated at a specific age

tools.name: get_competitor_age_in_game_v1_olympics_competitor_age_in_game_get
tools.description: Retrieves the age of a specific competitor in a given game. The operation requires the full name of the competitor and the name of the game as input parameters. It returns the age of the competitor in the specified game.
tools.default_descr: Get the age of a specific competitor in a specific game

tools.name: get_count_persons_by_region_v1_olympics_count_persons_by_region_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of persons associated with a specified region. The region is identified by its name, which is used to filter the data and calculate the count.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of persons from a specific region

tools.name: get_full_names_by_region_v1_olympics_full_names_by_region_get
tools.description: Retrieves the full names of individuals associated with a specified region. The operation filters the data based on the provided region name, returning a list of corresponding full names.
tools.default_descr: Get the full names of persons from a specific region

tools.name: get_region_names_by_person_v1_olympics_region_names_by_person_get
tools.description: Retrieves the region names associated with a specific individual. The operation uses the provided full name to search for corresponding records in the database and returns the region names linked to that person.
tools.default_descr: Get the region names of a specific person

tools.name: get_tallest_person_noc_by_gender_v1_olympics_tallest_person_noc_by_gender_get
tools.description: Retrieve the National Olympic Committee (NOC) of the tallest person of a specified gender. The operation filters persons by gender and sorts them by height in descending order, returning the NOC of the tallest individual.

gender.description: Gender of the person (M or F)
gender.title: Gender

tools.default_descr: Get the NOC of the tallest person of a specific gender

tools.name: get_count_persons_by_region_gender_v1_olympics_count_persons_by_region_gender_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total count of individuals from a specified region and gender. The operation filters the data based on the provided region name and gender, and returns the corresponding count.

gender.description: Gender of the person (M or F)
gender.title: Gender

tools.default_descr: Get the count of persons from a specific region and gender

tools.name: get_city_names_by_game_v1_olympics_city_names_by_game_get
tools.description: Retrieves the names of cities that have hosted a specific Olympic game. The operation filters the list of cities based on the provided game name.
tools.default_descr: Get the city names of a specific game

tools.name: get_games_names_by_city_v1_olympics_games_names_by_city_get
tools.description: Retrieve the names of the Olympic games that took place in a specified city. The operation requires the city's name as input and returns a list of corresponding game names.
tools.default_descr: Get the names of the games held in a specific city

tools.name: get_first_game_year_by_city_v1_olympics_first_game_year_by_city_get
tools.description: Retrieves the year of the first Olympic Games held in the specified city. The operation filters the games by city name and returns the earliest year in which the Games were held in that city.
tools.default_descr: Get the year of the first game held in a specific city

tools.name: get_count_games_by_city_v1_olympics_count_games_by_city_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of Olympic Games held in a specified city. The operation requires the name of the city as an input parameter.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of games held in a specific city

tools.name: get_avg_height_by_region_gender_v1_olympics_avg_height_by_region_gender_get
tools.description: Retrieves the average height of athletes from a specified region and gender. The operation calculates the mean height by querying the database for athletes from the given region and gender, then aggregating their heights.
tools.default_descr: Get the average height of athletes from a specific region and gender

tools.name: get_percentage_athletes_by_region_game_v1_olympics_percentage_athletes_by_region_game_get
tools.description: Retrieves the percentage of athletes from a specified region who participated in a particular game. The calculation is based on the total number of athletes in the game and the count of athletes from the given region.
tools.default_descr: Get the percentage of athletes from a specific region in a specific game

tools.name: get_sport_name_by_event_v1_olympics_sport_name_by_event_get
tools.description: Retrieves the name of the sport associated with a given partial event name. The operation searches for events that contain the provided partial name and returns the corresponding sport name. The input parameter is used to specify the partial event name.
tools.default_descr: Get the sport name based on a partial event name

tools.name: get_count_events_by_sport_v1_olympics_count_events_by_sport_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of events associated with a specified sport. The operation requires the name of the sport as an input parameter and returns the count of events linked to that sport.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of events in a specific sport

tools.name: get_game_ids_by_athlete_v1_olympics_game_ids_by_athlete_get
tools.description: Retrieves the IDs of all games in which a specified athlete has participated. The athlete is identified by their full name.
tools.default_descr: Get the game IDs based on a specific athlete's full name

tools.name: get_sport_with_most_events_v1_olympics_sport_with_most_events_get
tools.description: Retrieves the sport with the highest number of events, up to a specified limit. This operation returns the name of the sport that has the most events associated with it in the database. The limit parameter allows you to restrict the number of results returned.
tools.default_descr: Get the sport with the most events

tools.name: get_tallest_person_by_region_v1_olympics_tallest_person_by_region_get
tools.description: Retrieves the tallest person from a specified region, with the option to limit the number of results returned. The operation uses the region name to identify the relevant data and returns the full name of the tallest person(s) based on height.
tools.default_descr: Get the tallest person from a specific region

tools.name: get_person_with_most_competitions_v1_olympics_person_with_most_competitions_get
tools.description: Retrieves the person who has participated in the most competitions, based on the provided limit. The response is sorted in descending order, with the person having the highest number of competitions appearing first.
tools.default_descr: Get the person with the most competitions

tools.name: get_competitor_full_name_by_id_v1_olympics_competitor_full_name_by_id_get
tools.description: Retrieves the full name of a specific competitor based on their unique identifier. The competitor's ID is used to locate their full name in the database, which is then returned as the response.
tools.default_descr: Get the full name of a competitor by their ID

tools.name: get_count_competitions_by_full_name_v1_olympics_count_competitions_by_full_name_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of competitions a person has participated in, based on their full name.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of competitions for a person by their full name

tools.name: get_competitor_bmi_by_id_v1_olympics_competitor_bmi_by_id_get
tools.description: Retrieves the Body Mass Index (BMI) of a specific competitor, calculated based on their weight and height. The competitor is identified by their unique ID.
tools.default_descr: Get the BMI of a competitor by their ID

tools.name: get_percentage_male_competitors_by_region_v1_olympics_percentage_male_competitors_by_region_get
tools.description: Retrieves the percentage of male competitors from a specified region. This operation calculates the ratio of male competitors to the total number of competitors in the given region. The region is identified by its name.
tools.default_descr: Get the percentage of male competitors from a specific region

tools.name: get_youngest_competitor_v1_olympics_youngest_competitor_get
tools.description: Retrieves the youngest competitor(s) from the database, up to the specified limit. The operation returns the full name of the youngest competitor(s) based on their age at the time of the competition.
tools.default_descr: Get the youngest competitor

tools.name: get_count_competitors_by_event_and_age_v1_olympics_count_competitors_by_event_and_age_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of competitors participating in a specified event and age group. The event name can be partially matched using wildcard characters. The age parameter is used to filter competitors by their age.

event_name.description: Name of the event (use %% for wildcard)
event_name.title: Event Name

tools.default_descr: Get the count of competitors in a specific event with a specific age

tools.name: get_event_names_by_sport_v1_olympics_event_names_by_sport_get
tools.description: Retrieves the names of all events associated with a specified sport. The operation filters events based on the provided sport name and returns a list of corresponding event names.
tools.default_descr: Get event names for a specific sport

tools.name: get_medal_count_by_person_and_medal_v1_olympics_medal_count_by_person_and_medal_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of a specific type of medal won by a given person. The operation requires the full name of the person and the name of the medal as input parameters. It returns the count of medals that match the provided criteria.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of medals for a specific person and medal type

tools.name: get_event_with_most_gold_medals_v1_olympics_event_with_most_gold_medals_get
tools.description: Retrieves the event that has the highest number of gold medals. The operation filters the results based on the specified medal name, which is provided as an input parameter.
tools.default_descr: Get the event with the most gold medals

tools.name: get_person_count_by_region_v1_olympics_person_count_by_region_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of persons associated with a specified region. The region is identified by its name.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of persons from a specific region

tools.name: get_cities_hosting_minimum_games_v1_olympics_cities_hosting_minimum_games_get
tools.description: Retrieves a list of cities that have hosted at least the specified minimum number of games. The response includes the names of these cities, which are determined by querying the database for cities that meet the minimum hosting requirement.
tools.default_descr: Get cities that have hosted a minimum number of games

tools.name: get_game_count_by_city_and_season_v1_olympics_game_count_by_city_and_season_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of games held in a specified city during a particular season. The operation requires the city name and the season as input parameters to filter the games and calculate the count.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of games in a specific city and season

tools.name: get_region_with_most_persons_v1_olympics_region_with_most_persons_get
tools.description: Retrieves the name of the region with the highest number of persons. This operation aggregates and counts the number of persons associated with each region, then returns the region with the maximum count. The result is determined by joining the person_region and noc_region tables on the region_id field.
tools.default_descr: Get the region with the most persons

tools.name: get_city_of_earliest_game_v1_olympics_city_of_earliest_game_get
tools.description: Retrieves the name of the city that hosted the earliest Olympic Games. This operation fetches the city name from the database by joining the 'games_city', 'city', and 'games' tables, and then orders the results by the year of the games. The city with the earliest game year is returned.
tools.default_descr: Get the city of the earliest game

tools.name: get_game_with_youngest_competitor_v1_olympics_game_with_youngest_competitor_get
tools.description: Retrieves the name of the Olympic game that had the youngest competitor. The operation fetches the game's name from the games table and joins it with the games_competitor table to determine the age of the competitors. The game with the youngest competitor is then returned.
tools.default_descr: Get the game with the youngest competitor

tools.name: get_competitor_count_by_game_v1_olympics_competitor_count_by_game_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of competitors who participated in a specific Olympic game. The game is identified by its name, which is provided as an input parameter.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of competitors in a specific game

tools.name: get_athlete_event_count_medal_percentage_v1_olympics_athlete_event_count_medal_percentage_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of events and the percentage of a specific medal type that an athlete has won. The athlete is identified by their full name, and the medal type is determined by its unique ID. This operation provides insights into an athlete's performance and medal distribution across events.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of events and percentage of a specific medal type for a given athlete

tools.name: get_season_max_competitor_difference_v1_olympics_season_max_competitor_difference_get
tools.description: Retrieves the season with the maximum difference in the number of competitors between two specified games. The operation compares the competitor counts for each season across the provided games and identifies the season with the highest disparity.
tools.default_descr: Get the season with the highest difference in competitor counts between two specified games

tools.name: get_most_common_competitor_age_v1_olympics_most_common_competitor_age_get
tools.description: Retrieves the age that is most frequently observed among competitors in the database. The result is determined by grouping competitors by their age and then ordering the groups by the count of competitors in each group in descending order. The age from the group with the highest count is returned.
tools.default_descr: Get the most common age of competitors

tools.name: get_city_names_starting_with_v1_olympics_city_names_starting_with_get
tools.description: Retrieves a list of city names that start with a specified letter. The input parameter determines the initial letter of the city names to be returned.

letter.description: Letter the city name starts with
letter.title: Letter

tools.default_descr: Get city names that start with a specific letter

tools.name: get_city_names_for_games_v1_olympics_city_names_for_games_get
tools.description: Retrieves the names of cities that have hosted the specified Olympic Games. The operation accepts the names of two Olympic Games as input parameters and returns a list of city names that have hosted either of the specified games.
tools.default_descr: Get city names for specified games

tools.name: get_athlete_medal_names_v1_olympics_athlete_medal_names_get
tools.description: Retrieves the names of all medals won by a specific athlete. The athlete is identified by their full name, which is used to search across multiple tables: person, games_competitor, competitor_event, and medal. The operation returns a list of medal names associated with the athlete.
tools.default_descr: Get medal names for a specific athlete

tools.name: get_athlete_most_medals_excluding_v1_olympics_athlete_most_medals_excluding_get
tools.description: Retrieves the name of the athlete who has won the most medals, excluding a specific medal type. The operation filters out the specified medal type and calculates the total medals won by each athlete. The athlete with the highest count is returned.

medal_id.description: ID of the medal to exclude
medal_id.title: Medal Id

tools.default_descr: Get the athlete with the most medals excluding a specific medal type

tools.name: get_athlete_sport_names_v1_olympics_athlete_sport_names_get
tools.description: Retrieves a unique list of sport names in which a specific athlete has participated. The athlete is identified by their full name.
tools.default_descr: Get distinct sport names for a specific athlete

tools.name: get_oldest_competitor_v1_olympics_oldest_competitor_get
tools.description: Retrieves the full name of the oldest competitor in the Olympics. The operation returns the oldest competitor based on their age at the time of participation, as recorded in the games_competitor table. The result is determined by joining the person and games_competitor tables and sorting the records in descending order by age.
tools.default_descr: Get the oldest competitor

tools.name: get_game_with_most_female_competitors_v1_olympics_game_with_most_female_competitors_get
tools.description: Retrieves the name of the Olympic game that has the highest number of female competitors. The gender of the competitors is specified as an input parameter.

gender.description: Gender of the competitors (e.g., 'F' for female)
gender.title: Gender

tools.default_descr: Get the game name with the highest number of female competitors

tools.name: get_count_male_competitors_by_region_v1_olympics_count_male_competitors_by_region_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of male competitors from a specified region. The operation filters competitors based on their region and gender, then aggregates the count of male competitors from the selected region.

gender.description: Gender of the competitors (e.g., 'M' for male)
gender.title: Gender

tools.default_descr: Get the count of male competitors from a specific region

tools.name: get_count_competitors_by_city_v1_olympics_count_competitors_by_city_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of competitors who participated in the Olympics held in a specific city. The city is identified by its name.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of competitors in a specific city

tools.name: get_count_competitors_by_event_v1_olympics_count_competitors_by_event_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of competitors participating in a specific event. The event is identified by its name, which is provided as an input parameter.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of competitors in a specific event

tools.name: get_count_distinct_events_by_sport_v1_olympics_count_distinct_events_by_sport_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of unique events associated with a specific sport. The operation requires the name of the sport as an input parameter to filter the results.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of distinct events in a specific sport

tools.name: get_percentage_female_competitors_by_event_v1_olympics_percentage_female_competitors_by_event_get
tools.description: Retrieves the percentage of competitors of a specified gender in a given event. The operation calculates this percentage by counting the number of competitors of the specified gender and dividing it by the total number of competitors in the event. The result is then multiplied by 100 to express it as a percentage.

gender.description: Gender of the competitors (e.g., 'F' for female)
gender.title: Gender

tools.default_descr: Get the percentage of female competitors in a specific event

tools.name: get_average_age_by_game_v1_olympics_average_age_by_game_get
tools.description: Retrieves the average age of competitors who participated in a specified game. The operation calculates the mean age of all competitors in the given game, providing a statistical overview of the age distribution.
tools.default_descr: Get the average age of competitors in a specific game

tools.name: get_years_with_single_season_v1_olympics_years_with_single_season_get
tools.description: Retrieves the years in which only a single season type of Olympic games was held. The season type is specified as an input parameter, and the operation returns the years that meet the criteria.
tools.default_descr: Get the years with only one season type

tools.name: get_count_games_in_year_range_v1_olympics_count_games_in_year_range_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of games that took place between the specified start and end years, inclusive.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of games in a specific year range

tools.name: get_competitor_count_by_region_and_medal_v1_olympics_competitor_count_by_region_and_medal_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of competitors from a specified region who have won any medal, excluding a particular medal type. The operation filters competitors based on their region and medal records, then returns the count of unique competitors who meet the criteria.

medal_id.description: ID of the medal to exclude
medal_id.title: Medal Id

tools.default_descr: Get the count of competitors from a specific region who won a medal

tools.name: get_competitor_count_by_game_and_region_v1_olympics_competitor_count_by_game_and_region_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of competitors from a specified region who participated in a particular Olympic game. The operation requires the name of the game and the region as input parameters.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of competitors from a specific region in a specific game

tools.name: get_competitor_count_by_event_and_medal_v1_olympics_competitor_count_by_event_and_medal_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of competitors who participated in a specified event and won a particular medal. The event is identified by its name, and the medal is determined by its unique ID.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of competitors in a specific event who won a specific medal

tools.name: get_top_region_by_medal_v1_olympics_top_region_by_medal_get
tools.description: Retrieves the region with the most competitors who have won any medal, excluding the one specified by the input parameter. The operation returns the name of the region with the highest count of medal-winning competitors.

medal_id.description: ID of the medal to exclude
medal_id.title: Medal Id

tools.default_descr: Get the region with the highest number of competitors who won a specific medal

tools.name: get_competitor_names_by_sport_and_medal_v1_olympics_competitor_names_by_sport_and_medal_get
tools.description: Retrieve the unique names of competitors who have won a specific medal in a given sport. The operation requires the sport's name and the medal's ID as input parameters.
tools.default_descr: Get the distinct names of competitors who won a specific medal in a specific sport

tools.name: get_medals_by_competitor_v1_olympics_medals_by_competitor_get
tools.description: Retrieve the unique medal names won by a specific competitor, excluding a particular medal. The operation filters the medals by the competitor's full name and the ID of the medal to be excluded.

medal_id.description: ID of the medal to exclude
medal_id.title: Medal Id

tools.default_descr: Get the distinct medal names won by a specific competitor

tools.name: get_female_percentage_by_game_and_age_v1_olympics_female_percentage_by_game_and_age_get
tools.description: Retrieves the percentage of female competitors under a specified age in a given game. The operation calculates this percentage by counting the number of female competitors under the specified age and dividing it by the total number of competitors in the game.
tools.default_descr: Get the percentage of female competitors under a certain age in a specific game

tools.name: get_male_to_female_ratio_by_game_v1_olympics_male_to_female_ratio_by_game_get
tools.description: Retrieves the ratio of male to female competitors participating in a specified game. The operation calculates this ratio by counting the number of male and female competitors in the given game and returns the result as a real number.
tools.default_descr: Get the ratio of male to female competitors in a specific game

tools.name: get_highest_and_lowest_competitor_games_by_season_v1_olympics_highest_and_lowest_competitor_games_by_season_get
tools.description: Retrieves the games with the highest and lowest number of competitors for a specified season. The season parameter is used to filter the games, and the results are ordered by the count of competitors to determine the games with the highest and lowest number of participants.
tools.default_descr: Get the games with the highest and lowest number of competitors in a specific season

tools.name: get_medalist_count_v1_olympics_medalist_count_region_exclude_medal_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of medalists from a specified region, excluding those who have won a particular medal. The operation filters the results based on the provided region name and the ID of the medal to be excluded.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of medalists from a specific region excluding a specific medal ID

tools.name: get_competitor_count_v1_olympics_competitor_count_sport_games_bmi_get
tools.description: Retrieves the count of competitors who participated in a specific sport and games, within a defined BMI range. The BMI range is determined by the minimum and maximum BMI values provided as input parameters. The operation considers the weight and height of each competitor to calculate their BMI and filter the results accordingly.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of competitors in a specific sport and games with a specific BMI range

tools.name: get_avg_height_v1_olympics_avg_height_sport_gender_get
tools.description: Retrieves the average height of competitors in a specified sport and gender. The operation calculates the average height by considering the height data of all competitors who have participated in the given sport and gender. The sport and gender are provided as input parameters.
tools.default_descr: Get the average height of competitors in a specific sport and gender

tools.name: get_youngest_age_v1_olympics_youngest_age_by_person_get
tools.description: Retrieve the youngest age at which a specific person, identified by their full name, has competed in games. The operation returns the minimum age of the person in the games they have participated in.
tools.default_descr: Get the youngest age of a specific person in games

tools.name: get_person_count_same_region_v1_olympics_person_count_same_region_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of individuals hailing from the same region as the specified person. The person is identified by their full name.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of persons from the same region as a specific person

tools.name: get_event_count_v1_olympics_event_count_person_event_name_get
tools.description: Retrieve the total number of events a specific individual has participated in, based on a specified event name pattern. This operation filters the results by the full name of the person and the event name pattern, providing a count of matching events.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of events a specific person competed in with a specific event name pattern

tools.name: get_medal_count_v1_olympics_medal_count_person_event_name_get
tools.description: Retrieve the total number of medals a specific individual has won in events that match a given name pattern. The operation requires the full name of the person, a pattern for the event name, and the ID of the medal type. The result reflects the count of medals won by the person in events that meet the specified criteria.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of medals a specific person won in events with a specific name pattern

tools.name: get_city_names_v1_olympics_city_names_by_person_get
tools.description: Retrieves the names of cities where a specific individual has participated in competitions. The operation requires the full name of the person as input to filter the results.
tools.default_descr: Get the city names where a specific person competed

tools.name: get_game_with_most_competitors_v1_olympics_game_with_most_competitors_in_city_get
tools.description: Retrieves the name of the game with the highest number of competitors in a specified city. The operation considers all games held in the city and counts the number of competitors for each game. The game with the most competitors is then returned.
tools.default_descr: Get the game name with the most competitors in a specific city

tools.name: get_average_age_v1_olympics_average_age_by_game_and_region_get
tools.description: Retrieves the average age of competitors who participated in a specific Olympic game from a particular region. The operation requires the name of the game and the region as input parameters.
tools.default_descr: Get the average age of competitors in a specific game from a specific region

tools.name: get_region_name_by_noc_v1_olympics_region_name_by_noc_get
tools.description: Retrieves the region name associated with the provided National Olympic Committee (NOC) code. The operation uses the NOC code to look up the corresponding region name in the noc_region table.
tools.default_descr: Get the region name based on NOC code

tools.name: get_sport_name_by_id_v1_olympics_sport_name_by_id_get
tools.description: Retrieves the name of a specific sport by its unique identifier. The operation uses the provided sport ID to look up the corresponding sport name in the database.
tools.default_descr: Get the sport name based on sport ID

tools.name: get_event_id_by_name_v1_olympics_event_id_by_name_get
tools.description: Retrieves the unique identifier (ID) of a specific event from the database, based on the provided event name.
tools.default_descr: Get the event ID based on event name

tools.name: get_sport_id_by_name_v1_olympics_sport_id_by_name_get
tools.description: Retrieves the unique identifier of a sport, given its name. The operation searches for a sport with the provided name and returns its corresponding ID.
tools.default_descr: Get the sport ID based on sport name

tools.name: get_person_weight_by_name_v1_olympics_person_weight_by_name_get
tools.description: Retrieves the weight of a specific individual, identified by their full name. The full name is a required input parameter.
tools.default_descr: Get the weight of a person based on their full name

tools.name: get_city_id_by_name_v1_olympics_city_id_by_name_get
tools.description: Retrieves the unique identifier of a city based on its name. The operation uses the provided city name to search for a match in the database and returns the corresponding city ID.
tools.default_descr: Get the city ID based on city name

tools.name: get_competitor_count_event_medal_v1_olympics_competitor_count_event_medal_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of competitors who have won a specific medal in an event matching the provided name pattern. The event name pattern supports wildcard characters for broader search criteria. The medal name must be an exact match.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of competitors who won a specific medal in a specific event

tools.name: get_games_year_city_v1_olympics_games_year_city_get
tools.description: Retrieves the year of the Olympic Games held in the specified city. The operation uses the provided city name to search for a match in the database and returns the corresponding year of the Games.
tools.default_descr: Get the games year for a specific city

tools.name: get_competitor_count_games_age_v1_olympics_competitor_count_games_age_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of competitors of a specified age who participated in a particular Olympic Games. The operation requires the name of the Games and the age of the competitors as input parameters.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of competitors of a specific age in a specific games

tools.name: get_games_count_person_v1_olympics_games_count_person_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of games a specific individual has participated in. The operation requires the full name of the person as an input parameter to identify the individual and calculate the count of games they have competed in.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of games a specific person has competed in

tools.name: get_competitor_count_games_age_greater_v1_olympics_competitor_count_games_age_greater_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of competitors who participated in a specific Olympic Games and are older than a given age. The input parameters include the name of the Olympic Games and the minimum age of the competitors.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of competitors older than a specific age in a specific games

tools.name: get_heaviest_person_region_v1_olympics_heaviest_person_region_get
tools.description: Retrieves the full name of the heaviest person from the specified region. The operation filters the person data based on the provided region name and returns the name of the heaviest individual.
tools.default_descr: Get the heaviest person from a specific region

tools.name: get_tallest_person_region_v1_olympics_tallest_person_region_get
tools.description: Retrieves the height of the tallest person from the specified region. The operation filters the data by the provided region name and returns the maximum height value.
tools.default_descr: Get the tallest person from a specific region

tools.name: get_percentage_tall_athletes_by_region_v1_olympics_percentage_tall_athletes_by_region_get
tools.description: Retrieves the percentage of athletes from a specified region who are taller than a given height. The operation calculates this percentage by counting the number of athletes in the region who exceed the provided height threshold and dividing it by the total number of athletes in the region.
tools.default_descr: Get the percentage of athletes taller than a certain height from a specific region

tools.name: get_average_weight_by_region_and_gender_v1_olympics_average_weight_by_region_and_gender_get
tools.description: Retrieves the average weight of athletes from a specified region and gender. The operation calculates the average weight by joining data from the noc_region, person_region, and person tables based on the provided region name and gender.

gender.description: Gender of the athletes (M or F)
gender.title: Gender

tools.default_descr: Get the average weight of athletes from a specific region and gender

tools.name: get_count_games_by_city_and_year_range_v1_olympics_count_games_by_city_and_year_range_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of games held in a specified city within a given year range. The operation requires the city name and the start and end years of the range as input parameters.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of games in a specific city within a year range

tools.name: get_city_with_most_games_v1_olympics_city_with_most_games_get
tools.description: Retrieves the name of the city that has hosted the most Olympic Games. This operation returns the city with the highest count of hosted games, as determined by the data in the games_city and city tables. The result is based on the aggregation and ordering of the data, with the city name being the primary output.
tools.default_descr: Get the city with the most games

tools.name: get_games_name_by_city_and_year_v1_olympics_games_name_by_city_and_year_get
tools.description: Retrieves the name of the Olympic games held in a specific city during a given year. The operation requires the city name and the year of the games as input parameters.
tools.default_descr: Get the games name for a specific city and year

tools.name: get_percentage_medalists_older_than_v1_olympics_percentage_medalists_older_than_get
tools.description: Retrieves the percentage of medalists who are older than a specified age. This operation calculates the ratio of medalists above the given age threshold to the total number of medalists. The medalists are filtered by a specific medal ID.
tools.default_descr: Get the percentage of medalists older than a certain age

tools.name: get_competitor_age_v1_olympics_competitor_age_by_game_and_name_get
tools.description: Retrieves the age of a specific competitor in a given game. The operation requires the full name of the competitor and the name of the game as input parameters. The age is determined by querying the games, games_competitor, and person tables, and matching the provided game name and competitor full name.
tools.default_descr: Get the age of a competitor in a specific game by their full name

tools.name: get_competitor_count_by_gender_v1_olympics_competitor_count_by_game_and_gender_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of competitors who participated in a specific game, categorized by gender. The operation requires the name of the game and the gender as input parameters to filter the count accordingly.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of competitors in a specific game by gender

tools.name: get_competitor_names_v1_olympics_competitor_names_by_game_get
tools.description: Retrieves the full names of all competitors who participated in a specified Olympic game. The game is identified by its name, which is provided as an input parameter.
tools.default_descr: Get the full names of competitors in a specific game

tools.name: get_percentage_female_competitors_v1_olympics_percentage_female_competitors_by_height_and_year_get
tools.description: Retrieves the percentage of female competitors who are taller than a specified height in a given year. The calculation is based on the total number of competitors in the specified year.
tools.default_descr: Get the percentage of female competitors taller than a specific height in a specific year

tools.name: get_percentage_competitors_by_age_and_season_v1_olympics_percentage_competitors_by_age_and_season_get
tools.description: Retrieves the percentage of competitors who are older than a specified age during a particular season. This operation calculates the ratio of competitors above the given age to the total number of competitors in the specified season.
tools.default_descr: Get the percentage of competitors older than a specific age in a specific season

tools.name: get_region_id_by_person_name_v1_olympics_region_id_by_person_name_get
tools.description: Retrieves the region ID associated with a specific person, identified by their full name. This operation returns the region ID from the person_region table, which is linked to the person table via the person_id field. The person's full name is used to filter the results.
tools.default_descr: Get the region ID of a person by their full name

tools.name: get_person_height_by_region_v1_olympics_person_height_by_region_get
tools.description: Retrieves the height of individuals associated with a specified region. The operation requires the unique identifier of the region as input and returns the height data of the corresponding individuals.
tools.default_descr: Get the height of persons in a specific region

tools.name: get_city_names_by_games_id_v1_olympics_city_names_by_games_id_get
tools.description: Retrieves the names of cities that hosted a specific Olympic Games, identified by its unique games_id. The response includes a list of city names associated with the provided games_id.
tools.default_descr: Get the city names for a specific games ID

tools.name: get_games_ids_by_city_name_v1_olympics_games_ids_by_city_name_get
tools.description: Retrieves the unique identifiers of all Olympic Games held in a specified city. The operation filters the games based on the provided city name and returns their corresponding IDs.
tools.default_descr: Get the games IDs for a specific city name

tools.name: get_competitor_count_by_season_age_v1_olympics_competitor_count_by_season_age_get
tools.description: Retrieves the total number of competitors who are younger than a specified age in a given season. The season and maximum age are provided as input parameters.
tools.default_descr: Get the count of competitors under a certain age in a specific season

tools.name: get_distinct_games_names_by_games_id_v1_olympics_distinct_games_names_by_games_id_get
tools.description: Retrieve a list of unique game names associated with a specific game ID. This operation fetches the distinct game names from the games table, based on the provided game ID. The game ID is used to filter the results, ensuring that only relevant game names are returned.
tools.default_descr: Get distinct games names for a specific games ID

tools.name: get_average_age_by_season_v1_olympics_average_age_by_season_get
tools.description: Retrieves the average age of competitors who participated in a specified season of the games. The season is provided as an input parameter.
tools.default_descr: Get the average age of competitors in a specific season

tools.name: get_percentage_competitors_by_season_age_v1_olympics_percentage_competitors_by_season_age_get
tools.description: Retrieves the percentage of competitors under a specified age during a particular season. This operation calculates the ratio of competitors below the given age to the total number of competitors in the specified season. The season and maximum age are provided as input parameters.
tools.default_descr: Get the percentage of competitors under a certain age in a specific season

tools.name: get_distinct_medal_names_by_competitor_v1_olympics_distinct_medal_names_by_competitor_get
tools.description: Retrieve a unique list of medal names awarded to a specific competitor. The operation requires the competitor's ID as input to filter the results.
tools.default_descr: Get distinct medal names for a specific competitor

tools.name: get_event_ids_by_medal_name_v1_olympics_event_ids_by_medal_name_get
tools.description: Retrieves the event IDs associated with a specific medal. The operation filters events based on the provided medal name and returns their corresponding IDs.
tools.default_descr: Get the event IDs for a specific medal name

tools.name: get_heaviest_person_v1_olympics_heaviest_person_get
tools.description: Retrieves the full name of the heaviest individual, as determined by their recorded weight.
tools.default_descr: Get the full name of the heaviest person

tools.name: get_percentage_bronze_medals_v1_olympics_percentage_bronze_medals_get
tools.description: Retrieves the percentage of a specific type of medal (e.g., bronze) awarded in a given event. This operation calculates the ratio of the count of a particular medal to the total number of competitors in the specified event.
tools.default_descr: Get the percentage of bronze medals in a specific event

tools.name: get_noc_by_weight_v1_olympics_noc_by_weight_get
tools.description: Retrieves the National Olympic Committee (NOC) of athletes who weigh a specific amount. The operation filters athletes based on the provided weight and returns the corresponding NOC.
tools.default_descr: Get the NOC of people with a specific weight

tools.name: get_city_of_oldest_competitor_v1_olympics_city_of_oldest_competitor_get
tools.description: Retrieves the city name of the oldest competitor in the Olympics. This operation fetches the city information by joining the competitor, games, and city tables, and then orders the results by the competitor's age in descending order. The city of the oldest competitor is returned as the result.
tools.default_descr: Get the city of the oldest competitor

tools.name: get_heaviest_person_noc_region_v1_olympics_heaviest_person_noc_region_get
tools.description: Retrieves the National Olympic Committee (NOC) and region name of the heaviest individual, as determined by their weight. This operation involves joining multiple tables to gather the necessary data, and the result is sorted by weight in descending order to identify the heaviest person.
tools.default_descr: Get the NOC and region name of the heaviest person

tools.name: get_average_weight_by_medal_v1_olympics_average_weight_by_medal_get
tools.description: Retrieves the average weight of athletes who have won a specific medal. The operation calculates the average weight based on the provided medal name, considering the weight of all athletes who have won that medal in the Olympics.
tools.default_descr: Get the average weight of medal winners by medal name

tools.name: get_distinct_seasons_by_height_weight_v1_olympics_distinct_seasons_by_height_weight_get
tools.description: Retrieves the unique seasons in which competitors of a specific height and weight have participated. This operation filters the games data based on the provided height and weight, and returns the distinct seasons in which these competitors have been involved.
tools.default_descr: Get distinct seasons for competitors with specific height and weight

tools.name: get_distinct_full_names_by_medal_v1_olympics_distinct_full_names_by_medal_get
tools.description: Retrieves a unique list of full names of individuals who have won a specific type of medal in the Olympics. The type of medal is specified as an input parameter.
tools.default_descr: Get distinct full names of medal winners by medal name

tools.name: get_average_height_by_age_range_v1_olympics_average_height_by_age_range_get
tools.description: Retrieves the average height of competitors who fall within a specified age range. The age range is defined by the provided minimum and maximum age values. This operation calculates the average height from the person table, considering only those individuals who have participated in games and whose ages are within the specified range.
tools.default_descr: Get the average height of competitors within a specific age range

tools.name: get_age_of_tallest_person_v1_olympics_age_of_tallest_person_get
tools.description: Retrieves the age of the tallest person in the database. The operation identifies the tallest person by comparing the heights of all individuals and then returns the age of the tallest person.
tools.default_descr: Get the age of the tallest person

tools.name: get_weight_difference_count_by_age_v1_olympics_weight_difference_count_by_age_get
tools.description: Retrieve the count difference of competitors with weights above and below a specified threshold for individuals under a certain age. This operation provides insights into the distribution of competitor weights within a specific age range.
tools.default_descr: Get the difference in count of competitors above and below a specific weight for a given age

tools.name: get_competitor_age_percentage_v1_olympics_competitor_age_percentage_get
tools.description: Retrieves the percentage of competitors of a specific age in a given game. This operation calculates the ratio of competitors of the specified age to the total number of competitors in the selected game. The age and game name are provided as input parameters.
tools.default_descr: Get the percentage of competitors of a specific age in a given game

tools.name: get_distinct_region_names_tall_males_v1_olympics_distinct_region_names_tall_males_get
tools.description: Retrieves a list of unique region names where male competitors taller than a specified height percentage threshold have participated. The height percentage is calculated based on the average height of all competitors of the same gender.
tools.default_descr: Get distinct region names of male competitors taller than a specific height percentage
